reference_machine: Apple M5 Pro MacBook Pro, 18 cores, 48 GB RAM
refreeze_reason: The July 17 refreeze binds the rebuilt 25-case SEC corpus and the final 9B citation-grounding repair: precise two-source amendment labels, decision-relevant retrieval, exact amendment-to-agreement identifier binding, full-subject effective-date guards, named-agreement party-operand binding, amendment-recital date binding, competing-amendment rejection, exact amendment-opening party binding, full-sentence citation preference, scalar-question eligibility, single-clause actor-to-percentage citation repair, allocation-specific retrieval, and fail-closed legal-party parsing. A fresh three-source BMS ornith:9b pilot measured 21.929 seconds for Brief and 11.005 seconds for answerable Ask. Both operations remain within the previously frozen 35-second p95 budget; the canonical full-corpus run records the final 50-operation distribution.
invalidation_rule: Re-measure and re-freeze when the model, prompt scheme, retrieval pipeline, corpus, or reference machine changes.
